info.description:
Double-entry e-wallet ledger. The Go service is a thin RPC client over PostgreSQL stored functions; all balance validation, double-entry posting, fee/VAT and reversal logic run atomically in plpgsql. Scope is internal synchronous posting (top-up, transfer, withdraw, merchant settlement, fee/VAT, reversal). External rails (NAPAS, card 3DS, MT940) are out of scope.

## Response envelope
All responses use a uniform envelope. Success (2xx): `{ "errorCode": "00000", "errorMessage": "Success!", "data": <payload>, "trace_id": "...", "timestamp": "..." }` — the operation payload shown in each endpoint's 200/201 schema lives under `data`. Errors use `application/problem+json`: `errorCode` is a SQLSTATE-style code (real PostgreSQL SQLSTATE for SP-raised errors, an `E####` synthetic for Go-side errors, or `999999` when the code is not client-safe), and `errorMessage` is the full `BUSINESS_CODE: detail` string whose leading token is the business code listed below. Errors also carry `iso20022_reason_code`, `transaction_status` (pain.002), `detail`, `trace_id`, `timestamp`, and field-level `errors`.

### Business error code catalogue
`business code` = leading token of `errorMessage`; `errorCode` = the value returned in the body's `errorCode` field.
| business code | errorCode | HTTP | ISO 20022 | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| INVALID_AMOUNT | E4024 | 400 | AM12 | The transaction amount is invalid or missing |
| AMOUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE | E4024 | 400 | AM02 | The amount is outside the allowed range for this transaction type |
| METADATA_TOO_LARGE | E4007 | 400 | - | The metadata payload exceeds the maximum allowed size (1 KB) |
| METADATA_HAS_P1 | E4008 | 400 | - | The metadata contains forbidden PII keys (phone, email, cccd, passport, full_name, bank_acct_no) |
| SAME_ACCOUNT | E4002 | 400 | BE01 | Source and destination accounts must be different |
| TRAN_TYPE_INACTIVE | E4003 | 400 | AG02 | The requested transaction type is inactive or does not exist |
| INVALID_REQUEST | E4001 | 400 | - | The request body is malformed or missing required fields |
| INVALID_PHONE_FORMAT | E2001 | 400 | - | Phone number must match Vietnam format 0XXXXXXXXX (10 digits) |
| INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS | E4022 | 422 | AM04 | The account balance is not sufficient to cover this transaction |
| TIER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED | E4023 | 422 | AM02 | The transaction exceeds the daily or monthly limit for this account tier |
| ACCT_ROLE_INVALID | E3008 | 422 | - | Operation only allowed on standalone wallets, not SHARD/SETTLEMENT accounts |
| INVALID_CLIENT_TYPE | E2010 | 422 | - | Client type must be one of IND, CORP, MER |
| INVALID_ACCT_TYPE | E3007 | 422 | - | The specified account type does not exist |
| ACCT_CLOSE_NONZERO_BAL | E3003 | 422 | - | Account closure requires a zero balance |
| ORG_FIELDS_REQUIRED | E2013 | 422 | - | Corporate/merchant clients must provide business_reg_no and legal_rep in extra_data |
| INVALID_SHARD_COUNT | E3030 | 422 | - | Shard count must be 4, 8, or 16 |
| INVALID_GROUP_TYPE | E3032 | 422 | - | Group type must be one of MERCHANT, AGENT, NOSTRO_HOT |
| INVALID_DATE | E8003 | 422 | DT01 | The as_of_date parameter is invalid or refers to a future date |
| BATCH_SIZE_EXCEEDED | E8004 | 422 | - | The batch request exceeds the maximum number of items (100) |
| RESTRAINT_TYPE_INVALID | E3022 | 422 | - | Restraint type must be one of DEBIT, CREDIT, ALL, INFO |
| RESTRAINT_PURPOSE_INVALID | E3023 | 422 | - | Restraint purpose is not a recognized value |
| RESTRAINT_TYPE_PURPOSE_CONFLICT | E3024 | 422 | - | The restraint type/purpose combination is not allowed |
| RESTRAINT_AMT_EXCEEDS_BALANCE | E3025 | 422 | AM04 | The pledged amount cannot exceed the current account balance |
| RESTRAINT_DATE_INVALID | E3026 | 422 | DT01 | The end_date must be on or after the start_date |
| COURT_ORDER_REMOVE_REQUIRES_DOC | E3027 | 422 | RR04 | Removing a COURT_ORDER/TAX_LIEN restraint requires a reference_doc |
| TIER_INSUFFICIENT | E2007 | 403 | RR04 | Your KYC tier does not permit this operation |
| FORBIDDEN | E1006 | 403 | AG01 | You do not have permission to perform this operation |
| UNAUTHORIZED | E1001 | 401 | - | Authentication is required or the provided credentials are invalid |
| DR_RESTRAINT_ACTIVE | E3005 | 423 | AC06 | The account has an active debit restraint (hold/lien) |
| CR_RESTRAINT_ACTIVE | E3006 | 423 | AC06 | The account has an active credit restraint |
| ACCT_NOT_FOUND | E3001 | 404 | AC01 | The specified account does not exist |
| CLIENT_NOT_FOUND | E2011 | 404 | - | No client record found for the specified client number |
| KYC_NOT_FOUND | E2012 | 404 | - | No KYC record exists for this client |
| BANK_LINK_NOT_FOUND | E2014 | 404 | - | No linked bank account found with the specified ID |
| RESTRAINT_NOT_FOUND | E3020 | 404 | - | No restraint exists with the specified ID |
| WD_NOT_FOUND | E6101 | 404 | - | No withdrawal record found for the given payout reference |
| ACCT_NOT_ACTIVE | E3004 | 403 | AC04 | The account is blocked or closed and cannot process transactions |
| VERSION_CONFLICT | E4025 | 409 | - | Another transaction updated this account simultaneously; retryable |
| DUPLICATE_REFERENCE | E4011 | 409 | AM05 | A transaction with this reference has already been processed |
| CLIENT_ALREADY_EXISTS | E2009 | 409 | AM05 | A client with this identity document already exists |
| PHONE_ALREADY_REGISTERED | E2002 | 409 | AM05 | This phone number is already associated with an existing account |
| MAX_WALLET_PER_CLIENT_EXCEEDED | E3002 | 409 | - | Maximum number of wallets reached (CONSUMER 3 per currency, MERCHANT 10) |
| GROUP_ALREADY_ACTIVATED | E3031 | 409 | - | This merchant group has already been activated with shards |
| GROUP_ALREADY_EXISTS | E3033 | 409 | AM05 | A group with this ID already exists |
| GROUP_NOT_ACTIVATED | E3034 | 409 | - | This group is still cold (0 shards); activate it before rescaling |
| RESTRAINT_ALREADY_REMOVED | E3021 | 409 | - | This restraint has already been released or expired |
| WD_ALREADY_COMPLETED | E6102 | 409 | - | This withdrawal has already reached COMPLETED status |
| WD_INVALID_STATE | E6103 | 409 | - | The withdrawal is in a state that does not permit this transition |
| WD_ALREADY_REVERSED | E6104 | 409 | - | This withdrawal has already been reversed |
| PERIOD_CLOSED | E8005 | 409 | DT01 | The target accounting date is sealed; post against the current open period |
| GONE_ONLINE | E8001 | 410 | - | Historical data beyond the online retention period; request an archive extract |
| TIMEOUT | E9004 | 504 | - | The request exceeded the allowed processing time; you may retry (503 on lock timeout) |
| PII_DEK_NOT_SET | E5005 | 500 | - | The server PII data-encryption key (DEK) is not set |
| BATCH_UNBALANCED | E5003 | 500 | - | Internal double-entry invariant violated (sum of debits != sum of credits) |
| INTERNAL_ERROR | E9001 | 500 | - | An unexpected error occurred; please retry or contact support |

Family fallbacks: any `*_NOT_FOUND` -> 404, `*_NOT_ACTIVE` -> 403, `*_CONFLICT` -> 409 (e.g. GROUP_NOT_FOUND, SETTLEMENT_NOT_FOUND, GROUP_NOT_ACTIVE).
info.title: Core Wallet API

post.description: Open a zero-balance wallet for a client (count-limited per currency).

422.description: Business rule violation (e.g. account count limit)

get.description: Find accounts whose account number or client number contains the query (case-insensitive, substring). Returns acct_no + client_no + the MASKED client name. The query must be at least 6 characters (cheap-enumeration guard).

parameters.description: Search term (min 6 chars) — matched against acct_no / client_no
parameters.name: q

patch.description: Block / close / re-activate an account (status A | B | C).

get.description: Without as_of_date → customer realtime balance (§9.3.1). With as_of_date → historical end-of-day snapshot (§9.3.3, returns BalanceAsOfResponse).

200.description: Realtime balance (or BalanceAsOfResponse when as_of_date is set)

get.description: Masked client list (PII masked), keyset-paginated by client_no ascending. Optional status / client_type filters. Pass next_cursor as ?after= for the next page.

parameters.description: Keyset cursor: return rows with client_no > after
parameters.name: after

post.description: Create a client master record (identity only; no KYC flow). client_type is IND | CORP | MER.

422.description: Business rule violation (e.g. invalid client type)

get.description: Masked client profile (name + CCCD/passport masked); raw PII never exposed on this path.

patch.description: Patch mutable identity fields of an existing client (all fields optional).

get.description: Aggregate customer view — masked profile + wallets + linked banks (acct_no masked) + restraints. PII masked (wallet_app). Unknown client → 404.
List every wallet owned by a client (full account profiles, no client PII), oldest-first. A client with no wallets returns an empty list; unknown client → 404.

post.description: Link a bank account (optionally as default). acct_no is plaintext in; the SP encrypts it at rest and never echoes it in clear.
post.summary: Link a bank account to a client

put.description: Make an existing linked bank the client's default.

post.description: Submit/update eKYC info and raise the KYC tier (US-1.2). Reaching tier >= 2 stamps verified_at.
Charge an annual/penalty/service fee (with VAT) against a wallet, not tied to any money movement (US-2.8). Idempotent on `reference`.
Reverse a fee charge by its original `reference` (US-2.8). Idempotent.
Route an inbound merchant deposit/payment into a group: settlement while cold, a reference-hashed shard once hot (US-1.11). Idempotent on `reference`.
Withdraw from a merchant group settlement account, sweeping hot shards first when `auto_sweep` is true (default).
Reverse a merchant-settlement withdraw by its original reference, crediting principal + fee/VAT back to the settlement account. Idempotent. Ops-only — requires role wallet.finance.reverse.

get.description: List an account's restraints (all statuses), newest-first, keyset-paginated. Pass next_cursor as ?before_seq= for the next page.

parameters.description: Keyset cursor: return rows with seq_no < before_seq
parameters.name: before_seq

post.description: Place a hold/lien on an account; reduces available balance.
Release an active restraint. Body is optional (reason required only for court/tax restraints, enforced by the SP).
Reverse a completed transfer by its original `reference`. Idempotent (re-reversal returns was_already_reversed=true).
Internal credit to a wallet; settles immediately. Idempotent on `reference` — a duplicate returns 200 with the original result.
Reverse a completed top-up by its original `reference`. Idempotent.

get.description: List ledger legs for an account, newest-first, keyset-paginated. Optional post_date range. Pass next_cursor as ?before_seq= for the next page.

parameters.description: Keyset cursor: return rows with seq_no < before_seq
parameters.name: before_seq

get.description: Return every ledger leg of one transaction, primary-leg first.

post.description: In-book transfer (settles immediately, fee/VAT applied). Idempotent on `reference` — a duplicate returns 200.
Debit a wallet for external disbursement. Ledger commits immediately; disbursement is then driven by the Treasury state machine. Idempotent on `reference`.
Provision a new COLD merchant/agent group: the group row + its settlement account in one TX (US-1.10). Defaults: MERCHANT group of a MERCHANT-type VND settlement wallet.
Promote a cold merchant group (0 shards) to a hot wallet by creating N empty SHARD sub-accounts (US-1.9). Body optional; defaults to 4 shards.
Grow an already-hot group up a tier (4->8->16) and rebalance existing shards back to settlement first (US-1.12).
US-1.1/1.7 — create client + KYC + first zero-balance wallet in one TX. CORP/MER require extra_data.business_reg_no + legal_rep (BR-09).
Query up to 100 account balances at once. Unknown accounts are returned per-item with error=ACCT_NOT_FOUND (§9.3.4).

get.description: Ops/internal full balance view incl. ledger/calc/restrained breakdown and active restraints (§9.3.2).
UNMASKED client list — raw name + CCCD + decrypted phone/email (wallet_pii_ro). Same filters/keyset as the masked list. Privileged P1/PII read.

parameters.description: Keyset cursor: return rows with client_no > after
parameters.name: after

get.description: Privileged P1/PII read — raw name + CCCD/passport (wallet_pii_ro pool). Phone/email stay encrypted at rest.
Aggregate customer view — raw profile with decrypted phone/email + wallets + linked banks (acct_no decrypted) + restraints. Privileged P1/PII read (wallet_pii_ro). Unknown client → 404.

post.description: S2S callback — Treasury accepted the payout into a batch.
S2S callback — payout settled at the rail (NAPAS ref captured).
S2S callback — Treasury has submitted the payout to the rail.
S2S callback — payout failed/timed out; reverse the ledger debit. Idempotent (re-reversal returns was_already_reversed=true).

next_cursor.description: pass as ?after= for the next page
pass as ?after= for the next page

shard_index.description: null when routed to settlement (cold group)

auto_sweep.description: AutoSweep defaults to true (pointer distinguishes "omitted" from "false").

birthdate.description: Flat identity columns (FM_CLIENT_KYC). Dates are YYYY-MM-DD.

errorCode.description: SQLSTATE-style code: real pg SQLSTATE (P0060/40001/23505) for PG-raised, E#### synthetic for Go-side, "999999" when the canonical name is not whitelisted (§3.3)

errorMessage.description: full raw "CODE: detail" message (pg.Message verbatim for PG errors, synthesized for Go); "Internal Error" when not whitelisted

next_cursor.description: pass as ?before_seq= for the next page

status.description: A active | R released | E expired

next_cursor.description: pass as ?before_seq= for the next page

tags.description: Money movement + ledger reads (topup, transfer, withdraw, merchant, reversals, fee/VAT, statement, restraints)
tags.name: finance

tags.description: Client master CRUD, onboarding, KYC, linked banks
tags.name: clients

tags.description: Merchant hot-wallet group lifecycle (provision -> activate -> rescale)
tags.name: merchant-groups

tags.description: Privileged/internal reads (full balance, batch balance, unmasked client PII)
tags.name: ops
